title: Token Search
description: Search any token by name or symbol across all indexed chains — returns address, chain, and logo for instant token lookup UIs.
useCase: Build a token search input that lets users find any token by name or ticker — returns contract address, chain, and logo for use in swap UIs and token selectors.

keyParams.q: Search query string — token name or symbol (e.g. 'USDC', 'Uniswap')
